source.body_text_sample:
Careers
Home/Careers
Join Our Mission
Build The Future Of Global Entrepreneurship

We work smart, move fast, and grow together.

Who We Are

At GenesisLink, we're not just consultants; we're a mission-driven team shaping the future of global entrepreneurship. Since 2020, we've supported startups from over 30 countries in launching and scaling businesses in Canada. We value integrity, innovation, and collaboration, and we're building a team that thrives on impact. If you're excited about startups, strategy, and international innovation, you'll fit right in.

Why Work With Us?

Working at GenesisLink means more than just a job;it's a chance to grow professionally, contribute meaningfully, and enjoy the ride along the way.

What You Can Expect
Hybrid work model with flexibility for remote collaboration
Group benefits including health, dental, and extended care
Performance-based bonuses & referral commissions
Training budget and professional development support
Casual, respectful, and inclusive team environment
Opportunities for rapid growth and meaningful ownership
What Our Team Says
Yasaman Pourghazi
Marketing

"Working at GenesisLink has been an incredible journey. The team's commitment to innovation and the supportive environment has allowed me to grow both personally and professionally. The flexibility and collaborative culture make every day exciting."

1 / 3
Open Positions

Duration: 4–8 month co-op term (flexible)
Location: Remote (with optional hybrid meetings in Ottawa)
